description_long: This filing cabinet features a modern, rectangular design with a light wood grain finish on the top, sides, and front frame. The upper section is divided into two open cubby shelves by a vertical and horizontal divider, ideal for storing books or documents. Below the open shelves, there are two large cabinet doors with horizontal bar handles, finished in a lighter, almost whitewashed wood tone. The back panel is plain and secured with visible screws, while the sides are smooth and unadorned. The cabinet stands on small, barely visible feet, elevating it slightly off the ground. Its overall appearance is clean and functional, suitable for contemporary urban environments.
description: A modern, light wood filing cabinet with two open shelves above two large doors with bar handles, featuring a clean and functional design.
description_view_0: Front view showing two open cubby shelves and two lower cabinet doors with horizontal bar handles.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the smooth, uninterrupted wood grain surface of the cabinet.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a plain back panel secured with screws and the tops of the cabinet doors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, showing the continuous wood grain finish.
